scenario_title: Making mistakes during art or summative project construction
minimal_context: The student is constructing drawings for their summative project in art class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's construct the drawings for your summative project based on the established rubrics.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Should the corn be curled up?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Draws and then erases the paper) I mess up something, I try again.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues to draw and erase the same spot repeatedly) When I get it wrong, I try again and again. Every time I mess up something, I try again. So, I never give up.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's construct the drawings for your summative project based on the established rubrics.

STUDENT: Should the corn be curled up?

TUTOR: What do you think?

STUDENT: (Draws and then erases the paper) I mess up something, I try again.

TUTOR: Keep trying.

STUDENT: (Continues to draw and erase the same spot repeatedly) When I get it wrong, I try again and again. Every time I mess up something, I try again. So, I never give up.

task.learning_goal: make decisions for their summative from peer and self -critiques based on established rubrics

related_quotes: Every time I mess up something, I try again. When I get it wrong, I try again and again. So, I never give up.
Every time I mess up something, I try again. When I get it wrong, I try again and again. So, I never give up.
